summary: Frontend-only end-to-end testing of the Recipe Vault Expo app via web preview (mobile viewport 390x844). All 16 requested functional scenarios pass: home/seeded data, featured card, category filter chips, search by title & ingredient, search clear, empty state, navigation to detail, detail content (hero, meta strip, ingredients, instructions), favorite toggle with persistence, edit FAB, edit pre-fill, save validation, dynamic ingredient/instruction add, save-to-AsyncStorage + appears on home, edit-existing updates same recipe (no duplicate), delete returns home, persistence across reload. Minor issue: when the detail screen is opened with no nav history (direct deep link) and the user deletes, router.back() has nothing to pop and the user gets stuck on the 'recipe no longer here' fallback screen. The normal user flow (home -> card -> delete) works correctly. Also captured RN web warnings about deprecated 'shadow*' style props.

ui_bugs.issue: After deleteRecipe, the screen calls router.back(). If the detail screen is opened via a direct URL (no history), the back action is unhandled and the user is left on the 'This recipe is no longer here' state with only a 'Go back' button that also no-ops. Reference: /app/frontend/app/recipe/[id].tsx:51-53. Suggest router.replace('/') as a safe fallback when router.canGoBack() is false.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Originating from favFab in /app/frontend/app/recipe/[id].tsx:258-262. Cosmetic only; consider using a cross-platform shadow helper or boxShadow on web.

action_items: Low priority: in /app/frontend/app/recipe/[id].tsx onDelete, fall back to router.replace('/') when router.canGoBack() is false so direct deep-link delete returns user to home instead of leaving them on the 'no longer here' fallback.
Optional cosmetic: replace shadow* props on favFab with cross-platform boxShadow to silence RN web deprecation warning.
critical_code_review_comments: No backend used; recipes persist via storage util (AsyncStorage on native, localStorage on web). Verified write/read/update/delete + seed flag idempotency works on web.
saveRecipe uses unshift on insert and in-place update on edit - correct, no duplicate created when editing existing.
useFocusEffect on home + detail correctly refreshes after returning from edit/delete.
Form validation (title/ingredients/instructions) implemented and surfaced via [data-testid=form-error].
All interactive elements expose stable testIDs as documented.
seed_data_creation: None added; relied on the 5 built-in seeded recipes loaded via 'recipes.seeded.v1' flag. Created and then deleted a TEST Sandwich recipe during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Web preview at https://meal-keeper-2.preview.emergentagent.com. localStorage keys: 'recipes.v1' (JSON-encoded list) and 'recipes.seeded.v1' (boolean flag). Storage util wraps values with JSON.stringify so reads on web come back as a quoted JSON string and must be JSON.parse'd twice for the recipes list. Image picker (expo-image-picker) is not testable in web Playwright — the picker tile renders but actual file selection cannot be exercised; placeholder image path was verified.
rca_of_issue: Detail-screen delete stuck state: router.back() is the only navigation called after deleteRecipe. When the screen was reached without a prior navigator entry (e.g. fresh tab on a deep link), Expo Router logs 'The action GO_BACK was not handled by any navigator' and the screen stays mounted; useFocusEffect re-runs load(), getRecipeById returns null, and the fallback 'This recipe is no longer here' renders. Reproduction: open /recipe/<id> in a new tab, tap delete. Fix: use router.canGoBack() ? router.back() : router.replace('/').
